arguments.content:
# Pricing Plans

Choose the plan that fits your needs. All plans include core features with no hidden fees.

---

## Starter
**$49/month**

> "Perfect for getting started and small teams"

### What's Included

**Core Access**  
Full access to essential features with a seamless onboarding experience. Get up and running in minutes.

**Standard Support**  
Email support with 24-hour response time. Our team is here to help you succeed.

**Basic Analytics**  
Track your key metrics with easy-to-read dashboards and weekly summary reports.

**5 Team Members**  
Collaborate with your core team. Add up to 5 active users under one plan.

**[Start Your Free Trial]**

---

## Professional
**$79/month**

> "For growing teams that need more power"

### What's Included

**Everything in Starter, plus:**

**Priority Access**  
Skip the queue with priority processing and advanced feature access before anyone else.

**Advanced Analytics**  
Deep-dive reports, custom dashboards, and real-time insights to drive informed decisions.

**Priority Support**  
Live chat and phone support with 4-hour response time. Dedicated success manager included.

**25 Team Members**  
Scale your collaboration. Room for your entire department with flexible user management.

**API Access**  
Connect your favorite tools with our full-featured API and pre-built integrations.

**[Upgrade to Professional]**

---

## Enterprise
**$99/month**

> "Built for organizations that demand excellence"

### What's Included

**Everything in Professional, plus:**

**Unlimited Everything**  
No caps on team size, storage, or usage. Grow without limits.

**Custom Integrations**  
Tailored solutions for your unique workflow. Our engineers build to your specifications.

**White-Label Options**  
Present the platform as your own with custom branding, domains, and styling.

**24/7 Premium Support**  
Round-the-clock assistance with 1-hour response guarantee. Your dedicated team is always on call.

**Security & Compliance**  
SSO, audit logs, SOC 2 compliance, and custom security configurations for enterprise requirements.

**SLA Guarantee**  
99.9% uptime commitment with financial backing. Your business never stops.

**[Contact Sales]**

---

## Quick Comparison

| Feature | Starter | Professional | Enterprise |
|---------|---------|--------------|------------|
| **Price** | $49/month | $79/month | $99/month |
| **Team Size** | 5 members | 25 members | Unlimited |
| **Support** | Email (24h) | Live chat + Phone (4h) | 24/7 Premium (1h) |
| **Analytics** | Basic | Advanced | Custom |
| **API Access** | — | ✓ | ✓ |
| **Custom Integrations** | — | — | ✓ |
| **White Label** | — | — | ✓ |
| **SLA Guarantee** | — | — | 99.9% |
| **Security & Compliance** | Standard | Standard | Enterprise-grade |

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Can I switch plans later?**  
Absolutely. Upgrade or downgrade anytime. Changes take effect on your next billing cycle.

**Is there a free trial?**  
Yes—14 days on any plan, no credit card required.

**What payment methods do you accept?**  
All major credit cards, PayPal, and wire transfer for annual Enterprise contracts.

**Do you offer annual discounts?**  
Save 17% when you pay annually. That's 2 months free.

---

*Ready to get started? Questions? [Contact our sales team](#) for personalized guidance.*
